Class TimeoutProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.netflix.eureka.TimeoutProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("eureka.client.timeout") public class TimeoutProperties extends Object
Properties for configuring timeouts used in RestClient required by EurekaHttpClient.
Since:
4.2.0
Author:
Jiwon Jeon, Mooyong Lee, Olga Maciaszek-Sharma

  • Field Summary

    Fields

    Field
    Description
    protected int
    connectRequestTimeout
     
    protected int
    connectTimeout
    Default values are set to 180000, in keeping with RequestConfig and SocketConfig defaults.
    protected int
    socketTimeout
